case_title: CRISTIAN BRUCE ORTIZ VS. PATSY REESE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ORTIZ, CRISTIAN BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, PATSY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF MAILING BY ERIC MONTOYA FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTIAN BRUCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PATSY REESE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $257.50 SERVED MAR-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, PATSY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTIAN BRUCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REESE, PATSY $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $332.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,932.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTIAN BRUCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTIAN BRUCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REESE, PATSY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $332.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,332.50, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,400.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT REESE, PATSY HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
